mapper.insert: /* oms-interfaces-order-sql-oracle insertMdRequestOrderQty */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INTF_MAL_MDRDEQODRDER ( PD_NO, SHPNG_DATE, LGCT_CNTR_CD, SHPNG_QTY, SHPNG_RSN, REQUESTDT, IFID, INTERFACE_ID, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES ( #{pdNo}, #{shpngDate}, #{lgctCntrCd}, #{shpngQty}, #{shpngRsn}, #{requestDt}, #{ifid}, #{interfaceId}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{surkey}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{surkey} )
